user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Scheduled run before user's first Monday meeting; or on-dema for account Alpine Ski House. Generating output.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF01-L trap (Handoff queue creates ceremony for items CSA could action inline); produces complete Top 5-10 accounts ranked by urgency x impact, reason per account, named next action with owner, time
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF01-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF01-L failure mode (Handoff queue creates ceremony for items CSA could action inline)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct migration architecture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
